title: Almanac for Spyglass Astronomy
description: Share stars, orbiting bodies and constellations in bulk using a copyable book (The Almanac)!
body:
# Almanac For Spyglass Astronomy is an Addon for [Spyglass Astronomy](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-astronomy) This is a simple mod that adds one item: The Astronomy Almanac. It is crafted as such
![the crafting recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67e33a78a7f970393e45c38374f6d45c2b106f02.png) You can save your Spyglass Astronomy Stars, Constellations and Orbiting Bodies to the Almanac by shift-right-clicking on a cartography table with it. The Almanac will also track it's version and who has authored any part of it (using this same process) it is shown on the tooltip
![the tooltip (.2)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02de867ec4b2ee7908b4f8d3bca8cb5a4ce7dcb2.png) Any person obtaining a copy of the Almanac can right click it (without sneaking) to read it and obtain all this informtion An almanac can be copied in the same way a written book can, by combining it with any number of book and quills in the crafting table
